seoTitle: Mullengandra vs Mullengudgery — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mullengandra and Mullengudgery. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mullengandra and Mullengudgery.
heading: Mullengandra vs Mullengudgery — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mullengandra, New South Wales and Mullengudgery, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mullengandra has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mullengudgery (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mullengandra or Mullengudgery safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mullengandra has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Mullengudgery scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mullengandra scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Mullengudgery scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mullengandra or Mullengudgery?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mullengandra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
